spec.long_desc: A large sign mounted on a pole is standing by the roadside.
spec.detailed_desc: It says :- Haon-Dor -------- This is the Forest of Haon-Dor. Enter at your own risk. Please report any strange occurrences to Furry, as Quifael and Derkhil are currently indisposed.

extra_descs.description: Not the most interesting pole in the world. Better leave it here, though, as it holds the sign in place.
